items.title: Waveform Playground
items.description: Real-time waveform visualization and synthesis — sine/saw/square oscillators, harmonic editing, FM controls.

items.title: Generative Universe
items.description: Procedural universe generator with interactive exploration controls.

items.title: Shader Systems
items.description: GLSL shader editor and visualizer — edit code, see results live.

items.title: Big Data Pipelines
items.description: Interactive data pipeline visualization with flow diagrams and concept exploration.

items.title: Modular Patch Lab
items.description: Interactive modular synthesis environment — patch VCOs, VCFs, and LFOs with cable routing.

items.title: Particle Systems
items.description: Generative particle effects you can manipulate in real time on canvas.

items.title: Audiovisual Ecosystems
items.description: Audio-reactive visual ecosystems that respond to sound input.

items.title: DJ & Performance Lab
items.description: DJ mixer simulation with turntables, crossfading, and live performance controls.

items.title: Generative Art
items.description: Live algorithmic art generation — code-driven canvas compositions.

items.title: Reverb Lab
items.description: Manipulate reverb parameters with real-time audio processing across multiple algorithms.

items.title: Realtime Visuals
items.description: Real-time visual effects renderer with parameter knobs.

items.title: Delay & Echo Lab
items.description: Interactive delay and echo processor with feedback loops and time-based controls.

items.title: Creative Coding Canvas
items.description: Canvas-based creative coding playground for sketches and experiments.

items.title: Sampling Lab
items.description: Audio sampling interface with pitch shifting, manipulation, and playback controls.

items.title: Psychoacoustics Lab
items.description: Explore audio perception with experiments in frequency response and binaural effects.

items.title: Algorithmic Composition
items.description: Generative music system — rule-based composition that plays itself out.
